tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij tabelke, dobierajac okreslenia (A-L) odpowiadajace danej kategorii. Trzy okreslenia podano dodatkowo i nie pasuja one do zadnej kategorii.

options.text: The daffodil is one of its national flowers
The red rose is its national flower
Home to Stonehenge and Big Ben
Its flag features a red dragon
The Highland Games are held here every year
Home to the tradition of St Patrick's Day parades
The thistle is its national emblem
The Three Lions appear on its football badge
